fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the routing number.
The system copied the number from the Routing No. field on the routing line.
The program uses this field internally.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number of the operation to which this entry refers.
The program uses this field internally.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the personnel.

fields.name: Operation No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the operation number that the comment refers to.
This field is filled in automatically by the system.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the status of the production order that this routing personnel line is related to.
This field is filled in automatically by the system.

fields.name: Prod. Order No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the production order number that the routing personnel is related to.
This field is filled in automatically by the system.

fields.name: Routing Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the routing that the production order capacity need relates to.
